canonical_question: How do you present OIA findings with health score visualization and risk heat maps?
aliases: creating organizational health dashboards for client presentations
building OIA risk heat maps and remediation roadmaps
visualizing organizational diagnostics results for executives
constraints: Health score methodology must be calibrated before presentation — raw scores without baseline comparison are meaningless
Network topology visualizations require anonymized data — never present individual employee names in heat maps to non-HR audiences
Before/after comparisons require minimum 30-day baseline measurement period — presenting without baseline is speculation, not diagnosis
Retainer proposals must use outcome-based pricing (metabolic recovery) — never propose time-and-materials for OIA engagements
Risk heat maps must use consistent severity scales across all client presentations — inconsistent scales destroy cross-engagement comparability

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User needs the diagnostic methodology, not presentation format
User needs pricing model design, not presentation recipe
User is building a live monitoring dashboard, not a client presentation
